name: Viewbix Inc.
summary: Viewbix Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated company focused on digital advertising, quantum technology and computing, and enterprise AI solutions. Through subsidiaries Gix Media and Metagramm, it develops and markets technological platforms that automate, optimize, and monetize digital online campaigns. It also recently acquired Quantum X Labs Ltd., adding quantum computing capabilities. The company operates primarily in Israel and trades on the Nasdaq Capital Market under ticker VBIX.
